SEARCH
Package bupt.ta.service

Class AdminService

java.lang.Object
bupt.ta.service.AdminService
public class AdminService extends Object
Shared admin analytics and workload-enforcement logic.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    AdminService.AdminApplicationRow
    Application row on an admin detail view.
    static class 
    AdminService.ApplicationAlert
    Application data anomaly flagged for admin review.
    static class 
    AdminService.CapacityAlert
    Job posting that has reached its selection capacity.
    static class 
    AdminService.DashboardSummary
    Aggregate counts for the admin dashboard.
    static class 
    AdminService.InterviewNoticeAlert
    Application in interview stage missing expected notice fields.
    static class 
    AdminService.LimitAlert
    TA who is at or over the configured workload cap.
    static class

    Full admin read-only report for one module organiser.
    static class 
    AdminService.MOJobDetailRow
    One job row on an MO admin detail view.
    static class 
    AdminService.MonitoringReport
    Aggregated alerts for the admin monitoring dashboard.
    static class 
    AdminService.TADetailReport
    Full admin read-only report for one TA.
    static class 
    AdminService.UserDirectoryReport
    Filtered user list with per-role activity metrics.
    static class 
    AdminService.UserListRow
    One row in the admin user directory.
    static class 
    AdminService.WorkloadRow
    TA workload summary for the admin workload page.

    Builds anomaly and capacity alerts for the admin monitoring page.

    Builds the admin read-only report for one TA.
    AdminService.UserDirectoryReport
    buildUserDirectoryReport(DataStorage storage, String roleFilter, String query)
    Builds a filterable user directory with per-role activity metrics.
    List<AdminService.WorkloadRow>
    buildWorkloadRows(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Lists each TA's selected workload for the admin workload page.
    int
    enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, String keepApplicationId, AdminSettings settings)
    Auto-closes excess SELECTED applications for one TA down to the configured cap.
    int
    enforceWorkloadLimitGlobally(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Applies workload-cap enforcement for every TA; returns total auto-closed count.
    static String
    normalizeStatus(String status)
    Normalizes application status strings for comparisons and reporting.
    double
    sumSelectedWorkloadHours(DataStorage storage, String applicantId)
    Sums estimated hours across a TA's SELECTED applications.
    boolean
    wouldExceedWorkloadLimitOnSelect(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, Job job, AdminSettings settings)
    Returns true when selecting this applicant for job would meet or exceed the admin workload cap.

      IOException

    • enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant

      public int enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, String keepApplicationId, AdminSettings settings) throws IOException
      Auto-closes excess SELECTED applications for one TA down to the configured cap.
      Returns:
      number of applications auto-closed
      Throws:
      IOException

      public int enforceWorkloadLimitGlobally(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings) throws IOException
      Applies workload-cap enforcement for every TA; returns total auto-closed count.
      Throws:
      IOException
